name: Kethra, Spark Commander
visual_description: A fierce human woman in rebel armor, scarred face set with fierce determination, gripping a blazing sword wreathed in white-hot flames. She strides forward mid-combat, sparks trailing from her weapon, rallying armored fighters emerging from shadow behind her. Intense, dynamic action pose.
full_prompt: A fierce human woman in rebel armor, scarred face set with fierce determination, gripping a blazing sword wreathed in white-hot flames. She strides forward mid-combat, sparks trailing from her weapon, rallying armored fighters emerging from shadow behind her. Intense, dynamic action pose.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
